name: pgGraph
description: Open-source graph database superpowers for your existing Postgres data.

name: aipointer
description: The AI cursor companion. Hold a key, ask a question, get an answer about whatever your cursor is pointing at. Vision LLM overlay for macOS, Windows, Linux. Multi-provider (OpenRouter, Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini). Voice in/out. MIT licensed. No telemetry.

name: HermesPet

name: neuralinverse
description: Code Modern. Code Legacy. Code Firmware. - open-source AI-native IDE with agentic coding, Power Mode, legacy modernization, and firmware development

name: shushu-internship-tool
description: 把岗位描述变项目，把项目变简历，把简历变面试。

name: cronalytics
description: Hermes Agent plugin for cron observability. Turn hidden automation into visible spend.

name: slopless
description: Deterministic textlint rules and CLI for catching prose slop in Markdown

name: jupyter-studio
description: The AI-native JupyterLab — open-source Cursor for notebooks. Cmd+K inline edit, multi-step agent with cell-level tools (read/edit/run), chat with @cell/@file context, ghost-text completion, one-click traceback fix. BYO model: Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini, Ollama, vLLM. Local-first, privacy-first, fully open source.

name: forge
description: AI coding agent workflow engine for structured task lifecycles.

name: ai-image-prompt-cookbook
